Reason: Salary band is categorical; imputing median would imply false precision

Decision: Kept as null — indicates active member
Reason: Null cancellation date means member has NOT cancelled; this is valid data

Issue: No single date column in flights
Reason: Required for time-series feature engineering in later phases

A member cannot have two separate records for the same month; sum is the correct aggregation for counts and distances
